caption:
Every lead that comes into your business passes through 5 gates before it becomes revenue.

Most owners only watch gate one, the click. That's why they keep buying more ads while the same share of leads dies at gates two through five.

Run this on your last 10 leads this week. For each one, mark the last gate it made it through: click, response, booking, show-up, return. Wherever most of them stop is your leak.

Black Arrow builds the systems that close gates two through five: instant response, CRM booking flows, show-up reminders, and review and reactivation sequences.

Want us to map your gates?

DM "MAP".

#ServiceBusiness #LeadGeneration #SpeedToLead #CRM #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Carousels currently lead saves and depth for authority/educational B2B content, and this ships an unclaimed journey-stage mental model (5 customer-lifecycle gates) distinct from the four-system scorecard and forensic diagnostic already covered.
